items.a: Most landing pages take 3–7 days depending on content readiness. Larger sites take 1–3 weeks.

items.q: Do you handle hosting and domains?
items.a: I can deploy to Vercel and guide you through domain setup, or work with your existing hosting.

items.q: Can you redesign my existing website?
items.a: Yes. I can keep your content and rebuild the UI, improve performance, and modernize the look.

items.q: What do you need from me?
items.a: A short brief, your offer/services, brand assets (optional), and any examples you like.
